label: Object
description: A generic museum object. Edit the fields below, or create additional kinds for specific object types (instruments, artworks, specimens, etc).

fields.name: Catalogue Number
fields.help_text: The unique catalogue ID assigned by your museum.

fields.name: Description
fields.help_text: A short description of the object.

fields.name: Location
fields.help_text: Where the object is stored or displayed.

fields.name: Date
fields.help_text: When the object was made or used.

fields.name: Date Examined
fields.help_text: When the object was last examined or catalogued.

fields.name: Related
fields.help_text: Related objects, pages, or external resources.
